question_text: Which of the following is a characteristic of particles in a solid?

options.label: A
options.text: Particles are loosely packed and move freely

options.label: B
options.text: Particles are tightly packed and vibrate in fixed positions

options.label: C
options.text: Particles have no fixed shape or volume

options.label: D
options.text: Particles are spread far apart with weak forces between them

explanation: In solids, particles are packed tightly together and held in place by strong forces. They can only vibrate in fixed positions, which is why solids have a definite shape and volume.
